languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

languages.text: "Ты думаешь, что после вашей гибели я оставлю крохотное царство фон Валанциус в покое? Зря".

traits.locale_text: "Ты думаешь, что после вашей гибели я оставлю крохотное царство фон Валанциус в покое? Зря".
traits.speaker: EX_Trazyn

languages.text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."
languages.original_text: "Ты думаешь, что после вашей гибели я оставлю крохотное царство фон Валанциус в покое? Зря".

traits.locale_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."
"Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."
"Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

languages.text: «¿Crees que dejaré tu insignificante feudo en paz cuando mueras? Ni lo sueñes».
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: «¿Crees que dejaré tu insignificante feudo en paz cuando mueras? Ni lo sueñes».

languages.text: “你以为你死后，我会放过你那块小小的领地吗？绝无可能。”
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: “你以为你死后，我会放过你那块小小的领地吗？绝无可能。”

languages.text: « Pensez-vous qu'après votre mort, je laisserai votre petit fief en paix ? Pas du tout. »
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: « Pensez-vous qu'après votre mort, je laisserai votre petit fief en paix ? Pas du tout. »

languages.text: "Öldükten sonra küçük derebeyliğini rahat bırakacağımı mı sanıyorsun? Bırakmayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: "Öldükten sonra küçük derebeyliğini rahat bırakacağımı mı sanıyorsun? Bırakmayacağım."

languages.text: "Denkst du ich werde dein kleines Reich nach deinem Tod in Ruhe lassen? Das werde ich nicht."
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: "Denkst du ich werde dein kleines Reich nach deinem Tod in Ruhe lassen? Das werde ich nicht."

languages.text: 「死んだら、この小さな領地を平和に任せると思うか。任せない。」
languages.original_text: "Do you think that, after you die, I will leave your little fiefdom in peace? I will not."

traits.locale_text: 「死んだら、この小さな領地を平和に任せると思うか。任せない。」
